summary: Iteration 25: All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Diesel Account tab and Cash/Diesel fields verified. New features: (1) Cash Paid auto Cash Book - entry with cash_paid > 0 auto-creates nikasi transaction, (2) Diesel Account System - pump management, auto diesel entries from entry form, pump-wise summary, payment/settlement with auto cash book.

console_warnings.warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
console_warnings.priority: LOW - accessibility warning, doesn't affect functionality

3_cash_paid_auto_cash_book.description: Creating entry with cash_paid > 0 auto-creates cash book nikasi transaction
3_cash_paid_auto_cash_book.verified_behavior: Creates cash_transactions entry with txn_type='nikasi', category='Cash Paid (Entry)', linked_entry_id set, description includes truck/agent/amount

4_diesel_paid_auto_diesel_account.description: Creating entry with diesel_paid > 0 auto-creates diesel account debit entry linked to default pump
4_diesel_paid_auto_diesel_account.verified_behavior: Creates diesel_accounts entry with txn_type='debit', pump_id/pump_name from default pump, linked_entry_id set

6_diesel_summary_api.description: GET /api/diesel-accounts/summary returns pump-wise summary with balance

response_structure.pumps: [{pump_id, pump_name, is_default, total_diesel, total_paid, balance, txn_count}]

7_diesel_payment_auto_cash_book.description: POST /api/diesel-accounts/pay creates payment + auto cash book nikasi entry
7_diesel_payment_auto_cash_book.verified_behavior: Creates diesel_accounts 'payment' entry AND cash_transactions 'nikasi' entry with linked_diesel_payment_id

8_delete_entry_cleanup.description: Deleting entry removes linked cash book and diesel account entries
8_delete_entry_cleanup.verified_behavior: Calls db.cash_transactions.delete_many and db.diesel_accounts.delete_many for linked_entry_id

9_g_issued_in_gunny_summary.description: G.Issued is calculated from entries and shown in gunny-bags/summary
9_g_issued_in_gunny_summary.verified_behavior: g_issued total summed from mill_entries, affects grand_total calculation

10_diesel_account_ui.description: Diesel Account tab in Payments page shows pumps, summary cards, transactions table
ui_elements: Pumps section with default pump star icon
Summary cards per pump showing balance

11_pay_settle_dialog.description: Pay/Settle dialog shows pending balance and allows payment

12_entry_form_fields.description: Entry form has G.Issued, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid, Remark fields

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/03_diesel_account_tab.png - Diesel Account tab with pumps and summary
.screenshots/09_entry_form.png - Entry form with Cash Paid, Diesel Paid fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested 2 major new features: (1) Cash Paid auto Cash Book - when entry has cash_paid > 0, auto-creates cash_transactions nikasi with category 'Cash Paid (Entry)' and linked_entry_id. (2) Diesel Account System - new diesel_pumps and diesel_accounts collections, pump management CRUD, auto diesel entries from entry form's diesel_paid field, pump-wise summary with balance, payment/settlement that auto-creates Cash Book nikasi. Delete entry cleans up both linked cash and diesel entries. Collections used: diesel_pumps, diesel_accounts, cash_transactions, mill_entries. Default pump 'HP Petrol Pump Kesinga' exists.
